title: The Top 10 Claude Code Plugins to 10x Your Next Project (June '26)
summary: A video guide reviewing 10 Claude Code plugins including Graphify, grill-me, Codex, claude-obsidian, and n8n MCP. The focus is solving memory constraints in large codebase analysis through knowledge graphs and plugin integrations rather than traditional RAG approaches.
